MASTER CALENDAR COURT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs CANDU CAPITAL GROUP LLC, RITU VOHRA and ARJUN DUTT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR as Moot. First Amended Complaint filed March 23, 2015. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Defendants Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Prayer For Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT CANDU CAPITAL GROUP LLC, RITU VOHRA and ARJUN DUTT's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Prayer For Punitive Damages is Off calendar as moot. First Amended Complaint filed March 23, 2015. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
